title: Online ANZ/APAC masterclasses: dashboards and reporting
excerpt:
To help you drive better visualisation and insights from your monday.com data, we have a special free A/NZ Masterclass series: monday.com dashboards and reporting.

posts.author: Ania (Ania Bokina APJ Marketing at monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
To help you drive better visualisation and insights from your monday.com data, we have a special free A/NZ Masterclass series: monday.com dashboards and reporting.

During each class, our experts will take you through the steps to craft each type of dashboard and understand the resources available. Please register for each session by clicking the enrolment links below.

Session 1

Insights & overview dashboards: sales pipeline, master calendars, portfolio management

Tuesday 26 September 2023 11:00-11:45am AEST - Enrol

Session 2

Functional dashboards: working board, team summary

Wednesday 27 September 2023 11:00-11:45am AEST - Enrol

Session 3

Directory/Resource library: comms board, forms, embedded pages

Thursday 28 September 2023 11:00-11:45am AEST - Enrol

Please feel free to share this invitation with other monday.com users in your organisation.

See you there!

The team at monday.com

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Amazing! Love this!

posts.author: afash (Anthony)
posts.cookedHtml: Will there be another session to cater for UK time zone users as this falls at 2am. I am interested in the functional dashboards masterclass
